displayName: World Cup Head to Head Fixture Trader

envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Simmer API key used by SimmerClient.from_env()

envVars.name: OWS_WALLET
envVars.description: Optional OWS wallet name for routing trades

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional external wallet private key for live trading
